name: 1.0 MG Tacrolimus Capsules IP
about: 1.0 MG Tacrolimus Capsules IP is a general medicine used for the prevention of organ transplant rejection in adults. These capsules are manufactured in India and come in a packaging of 6x10 capsules. The recommended dosage of these capsules is 1mg, which should be taken as per the doctors suggestion. The physical form of the medicine is capsules that should be stored in a dry and cool place to maintain their efficacy. These capsules contain tacrolimus as their active ingredient, which works by suppressing the immune system to prevent the rejection of transplanted organs.

faq.a: The recommended dosage for these capsules is 1mg, which should be taken as per the doctors suggestion.

faq.a: These capsules should be stored in a dry and cool place to maintain their efficacy.

faq.a: These capsules are used for the prevention of organ transplant rejection in adults.
